tagline: A multilingual 16-type personality quiz with a little bite
heroTitle: Read your habits, not your horoscope.
heroDescription: Answer 88 weighted questions across energy, perception, decision-making, and structure. Get a 16-type result, axis chart, reliability score, and a comment that is honest enough to be useful.

heroPoints.accuracy: 88 questions with balanced forward and reverse scoring
heroPoints.language: Japanese, English, Korean, and Simplified Chinese built in
heroPoints.privacy: Your progress and result stay in this browser unless you share them

questionGuide: Go with your default behavior, not your aspirational branding.
resultSubtitle: Pattern score across all four axes
reliabilityDescription: Reliability checks whether you answered similar questions in a consistent way. A lower score does not mean the result is wrong; it usually means your mood, context, or answer strategy was less stable.
axisDescription: The chart shows which side of each axis pulled harder.

EI.label: Energy
EI.description: How you recharge and where your attention naturally points first.

SN.label: Perception
SN.description: Whether you trust concrete evidence first or patterns and possibilities first.

TF.label: Decision
TF.description: Whether you prioritize logic structure or human impact when deciding.

JP.label: Structure
JP.description: Whether you prefer closure and order or flexibility and open options.

shareText: I got {type} ({title}) on Mirror 16. Reliability: {reliability}%. Apparently this is my personality now.
footer: MBTI-inspired only. Not official MBTI, not medical advice, and definitely not a legal excuse for your group chat behavior.
loading: Loading your language and saved progress...
emptyState: Answer every question to unlock the full result.
snarkLabel: Comment from the annoying honest friend
browserNote: Language is auto-detected on first visit, then saved locally.
errorGeneric: Something went sideways. Refresh and try again.
resultHint: Reliability improves when you answer based on how you usually act, not how you wish you looked online.
